title: Op catalog (governs ops.json)
description: The machine-readable command catalog IS canonical; the prose table in CONSOLE-CONTRACTS.md §5.2 is generated from it (CI-checked). Every entry must validate against $defs/opEntry.

spec_name_aliases.description: UI-spec op-name drift resolved here: spec name -> catalog name. The catalog name is the wire name.

human_only.description: Agents structurally excluded regardless of lanes (term.*, item.delete).

rule.description: own: target must belong to the caller. grant: caller needs `relation` on one of `scope_any` (templates substitute op args). own_or_grant: own, else the grant path. read: no target authorization; result scope-filtering applies. Lane AND authz must both pass BEFORE the intent audit.

scope_any.description: Acceptable scopes in order; ${arg} templates. Flat scope model: fleet does NOT imply agent:x — listing both is how fleet-wide grants compose.

executor.description: The single liveness-gating executor. Other participants are hops inside the effect.

args.description: JSON Schema fragment (draft 2020-12) for the op's args object, or a $ref.
